params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?

47차 sub-agent #11 (ade70cc2a0bb6977f) + #12 (a455fd87790ed9ed9) BREAKTHROUGH applied: ARCHITECTURAL PIVOT from filter_user_input → add_turn.

ROOT CAUSE of #676 PARTIAL (filter_user_input + is_warning:true): dispatcher passes `void 0` for 3rd handler arg under is_warning:true → handler short-circuits text-display branch BY DESIGN. The visible warning path is `addTypingMessage` (typing indicator), NOT warning text rendering.

NEW APPROACH (sub-agent #12 SHAPE_CONFIRMED): use `add_turn` command with fully-formed Turn shape. dispatcher source-quote: `case b.H5.add_turn: let k=e.turn; this.replaceOrRemoveDummyTurn(e.request_id,k) ? this.publishChatMessages() : (this.removeAllTypingTurns(), this.appendTurn(k));`. NO top-level shape validation — only silent-drop paths are duplicate turn_id (UUID v4 fresh per call avoids) + dummy-replace via request_id (we omit request_id).
